response:
AC-001

Given a customer is on the e-commerce platform
When the customer reviews items for purchase
Then the system allows the customer to proceed with the order workflow.

AC-002

Given a customer is proceeding with the order workflow
When the customer selects valid delivery and payment options
Then the system accepts the selected delivery and payment options.

AC-003

Given a customer has selected delivery and payment options
When the customer applies a valid coupon
Then the system processes the coupon according to defined business rules.

AC-004

Given a customer has finalized order details including delivery, payment, and applied coupons
When the customer initiates payment
Then the system begins the payment processing to ensure payment integrity.

AC-005

Given payment initiation is successful
When the system reserves inventory for the ordered products
Then inventory consistency is ensured.

AC-006

Given inventory has been successfully reserved
When the system creates the order
Then the order is securely purchased and processed in a timely manner.
